sections.paragraph: (“eradication,” compare Zep 2:4), [Ekron], pr.n. of one of the five principal cities of the Philistines, situated in the northern part of the land of the Philistines, first assigned to the tribe of Judah ( Jos 15:45), afterwards to the Danites ( Jos 19:43), Jos 13:3 15:11 19:43 Jud 1:18 1Sa 5:10 2Ki 1:2. LXX. Ἀκκαρών, Ἀκαρών [Perhaps now called ʾAkir, عاقر, Rob. iii. 22]. Gent. noun, עֶקְרֹנִי Jos 13:3 1Sa 5:10.
